name: Built-in DevTools
description: Enables Unity Hub's own debug helper, right-click inspection, and optional window tweaks.

config.label: Open DevTools on startup
config.description: Open DevTools Window automatically when Unity Hub starts.

config.label: Enable right-click inspect menu
config.description: Add a Unity Hub developer context menu with Inspect Element.

config.label: Disable minimum window size
config.description: Allow Unity Hub windows to be resized below Unity's built-in minimum size.

config.label: Use Windows native title bar
config.description: Use the normal Windows title bar instead of Unity Hub's custom frameless title bar.

config.label: Enable Windows snap layouts support
config.description: Use Electron's native Windows title bar overlay buttons so hovering Maximize can show Windows 11 snap layouts.
